data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D57A: MAY: Let's see... The POKéMON found\non ROUTE 103 include...
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D5B6:
Oh, hi, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\p...Oh, I see, my dad gave you a
POKéMON as a gift.\pSince we're here, let's have a quick
battle!\pI'll give you a taste of what being a
TRAINER is like.
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D65B: Wow! That's great!\n{PLAYER}{KUN}, you're pretty good!
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D688:
MAY: I think I know why my dad has an
eye out for you now.\pI mean, you just got that POKéMON but
it already likes you.\pYou might be able to befriend any
kind of POKéMON easily.\pWell, it's time to head back to the
LAB.
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D762: BRENDAN: Okay, so it's this one and\nthat one that live on ROUTE 103...
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D7A9: Hey, it's {PLAYER}!\p...Oh, yeah, Dad gave you a POKéMON.\pSince we're here, how about a little\nbattle?\pI'll teach you what being a TRAINER's\nabout!
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D856:
BRENDAN: I think I get it.
I think I know why my dad has his eye\lout for you now.\pLook, your POKéMON already likes you,
even though you just got it.\p{PLAYER}, I get the feeling that you
could befriend any POKéMON with ease.\pWe should head back to the LAB.
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D950: My POKéMON is staggeringly tired...\nI should have brought a POTION...
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D996: If you cross the sea from here,\nit'll be a shortcut to OLDALE TOWN.\pFufufu, that's useful, isn't it?
